extensionDescription.message: Parro Recorder automatically captures your clicks step by step and turns them into clear manuals and guides.

fullPageCaptureTitle.message: Capture full page (scroll to the end → save PNG)

privacyNotice.message:
While recording, the selected screen, page URL and title, clicks, and input screens are sent to Parro to create your manual.
Password values are not saved. Privacy Policy

clickAfterStart.message: Start recording, then click on the webpage

clickHighlightDescription.message: Show a red outline around the clicked element

zoomSelectionDescription.message: Zoom the manual image around the clicked area. You can adjust it later in the editor.

voiceRecordingDescription.message: Describe each step while recording. Parro turns it into polished text for the manual and keeps the original audio.

autoNavigationDescription.message: Automatically add a screenshot when the URL changes

saveTypedTextDescription.message: Save input text with each step so it can be copied in Live Guide Beta. Enabled by default for new recordings; passwords and sensitive fields are excluded.

captureInputClicksDescription.message: Save a separate step when you click an input without typing. Off by default; normally a step is saved only after text is entered.

actionStepHint.message: Click the target to advance automatically. Skip only if you are not completing this step.

explanationStepHint.message: Review the content, then continue to the next step.

internetOffline.message: You’re offline. Restore your connection, then check again.

serverUnavailable.message: Parro could not be reached. Check your network or security settings, then try again.

sessionExpired.message: Your session has expired. Connect your account again.

linkRequired.message: Connect your Parro account to start recording.

noRemainingSteps.message: No steps remain. Capture a step before finishing.

manualCreated.message: Your manual is ready! Opening it now.

analyzing.message: AI is analyzing your steps — please wait

checkNetwork.message: Check your network connection and try again

micPrompt.message: In the browser prompt above, select Allow for microphone access.

micRequired.message: Microphone access is required to record voice narration.

micUnblockHint.message:
If access is blocked, enable it manually:
1) Select the site information icon beside the address bar
2) Change Microphone to “Allow”
3) Select “Try again” below, or close and reopen this window
